institution.name: University of the District of Columbia

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of the District of Columbia fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of the District of Columbia rose 68% between 2021 and 2024 (17.5% → 29.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of the District of Columbia rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 (25.0% → 33.2%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of the District of Columbia rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 (53.1% → 67.6%).
